payload.summary_zh: GEOFlow 2.0.3 新增系统更新中心，支持版本检查、更新计划、备份、回滚、队列执行、预检与部署诊断，并补充 Ubuntu 24.04 LTS + Docker 生产部署排障说明。
payload.summary_en: GEOFlow 2.0.3 adds the System Update Center with version checks, update plans, backups, rollback, queued execution, preflight checks, and deployment diagnostics, plus Ubuntu 24.04 LTS + Docker production troubleshooting guidance.
payload.upgrade_tip_zh: 升级前请备份数据库、.env、uploads、storage 和目标渠道站点包；升级后可在后台右上角通知进入系统更新中心，先查看预检和部署诊断，再按需生成更新计划。
payload.upgrade_tip_en: Before upgrading, back up your database, .env, uploads, storage, and target-site packages. After upgrading, open System Update Center from the admin notification area and review preflight and deployment diagnostics before generating update plans.
